case_title: JUAN ANTONIO CARRENO VS. JENNY SPARKS

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF OCT-01-2019
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CARRENO, JUAN ANTONIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-20-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-20-2019 BY HAROLD E. KAHN. HAROLD E. KAHN. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT JUAN ANOTHONIO CARRENO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT JENNY SPARKS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT DID NOT SERVE THE PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDAANT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2019 BY ROBERT STUMPF

ORDER ON THE SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL JUDGMENT RENDERED ON AUG 19, 2019 BY THE HONORABLE JUDGE PRO TEM ROBERT STUMPF, JR IS ORDERED MODIFIED AS FOLLOWS: THE JUDGMENT AMOUNT OWED BY APPELLANT JENNY SPARKS IS REDUCED, DUE TO AN INADVERTENT ERROR BY THE COURT. THE CORRECT PRINCIPAL AMOUNT IS $632.48 PLUS $110.00 IN COSTS. THE CORRECT TOTAL JUDGMENT OWED IS $742.48 PER ORDER ON SC-105 ORDER OF AUGUST 19, 2019.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,203.52 FILED BY SPARKS, JENNY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CARRENO, JUAN ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SPARKS, JENNY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT CARRENO, JUAN ANTONIO SEE ENCLOSURE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER AND STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CARRENO, JUAN ANTONIO RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SPARKS, JENNY $632.48 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $742.48, THE SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL JUDGMENT RENDERED ON AUG 19, 2019 BY THE HONORABLE JUDGE PRO TEM ROBERT STUMPF, JR IS ORDERED MODIFIED AS FOLLOWS: THE JUDGMENT AMOUNT OWED BY APPELLANT JENNY SPARKS IS REDUCED, DUE TO AN INADVERTENT ERROR BY THE COURT. THE CORRECT PRINCIPAL AMOUNT IS $632.48 PLUS $110.00 IN COSTS. THE CORRECT TOTAL JUDGMENT OWED IS $742.48 PER ORDER ON SC-105 ORDER OF AUGUST 19, 2019. UDGMENT ON THE CROSS CLAIM IS AFFIRMED. CROSS COMPLANANT/APPELLANT JENNY SPARKS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRENO, JUAN ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT SPARKS, JENNY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-20-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-20-2019 BY HAROLD E. KAHN. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT JUAN ANOTHONIO CARRENO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT JENNY SPARKS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT DID NOT SERVE THE PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDAANT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2019 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2019 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT CARRENO, JUAN ANTONIO RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SPARKS, JENNY $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,110.00, JUDGMENT ON THE CROSS CLAIM IS AFFIRMED. CROSS COMPLANANT/APPELLANT JENNY SPARKS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY RESPONDENT/CROSS DEFENDANT JUAN ANTONIO CARRENO. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF MAY 12, 2019. (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT) NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
CORRESPONDENCE/REQUEST FILED (BY APPELLANT/DEFENTANT) FILED BY APPELLANT SPARKS, JENNY

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-24-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
JENNY SPARKS, APPELLANT/DEFENDANT APPEARING ON HER OWN BEHALF, WITH WITNESS ALICE LOCKE;
JUAN ANTONIO CARRENO, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF;

This cause comes on reguarly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

JUAN ANTONIO CARRENO, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced.

No new evidence is introduced.

JENNY SPARKS, APPELLANT/DEFENDANT testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced.

No new evidence is introduced.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission

JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT STUMPF, CLERK: W. TRUPEK, NOT REPORTED (525)
